hero.title: Full Stack Web Developer
hero.description: I specialize in creating modern, responsive web applications using the latest technologies like React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full Stack Web Developer with a passion for creating modern web experiences
about.description: I'm a Computer Systems Engineering student with experience in web development, responsive interfaces, API consumption, and performance optimization. I'm committed to continuous learning and technical collaboration.

contact.title: Interested in working together?
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision. Let's create something amazing together!

retro.title: Explore My Retro Portfolio
retro.description: Check out the previous version of my portfolio featuring three different retro computing eras with unique visual styles.

professionalSummary.title: Professional Summary
professionalSummary.description: Computer Systems Engineering student with experience in web development, responsive interfaces, API consumption, and performance optimization. Knowledgeable in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Committed to continuous learning and technical collaboration.

professionalGoal.title: Professional Goal
professionalGoal.description: I am seeking a role as a Junior Full Stack Web Developer in a team where I can apply my skills, continuously learn, and contribute to the development of accessible and innovative digital solutions.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Here are some of the projects I've worked on. Each project represents different skills and technologies I've mastered throughout my journey as a developer.

project1.title: Weather App
project1.summary: A real-time weather application using OpenWeatherMap API.
project1.description: A responsive weather application that displays current weather conditions based on user location. Features include automatic location detection, weather icons, and smooth transitions.

project2.title: ChatGPT Prompt Generator
project2.summary: A tool to create effective prompts for ChatGPT.
project2.description: A form-based interface to help programmers create effective prompts for ChatGPT. Supports both English and Spanish with automatic language detection.

project3.title: Animated Carousel
project3.summary: An interactive carousel with smooth animations.
project3.description: An interactive web application that presents mythical creatures and legendary heroes through an engaging, animated interface with smooth transitions.

project4.title: Dibet Fruits and Vegetables
project4.summary: E-commerce platform for a local produce business.
project4.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform enabling online ordering, inventory management, and order fulfillment for a local produce business. Built with Next.js for frontend and API routes, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and PostgreSQL for database management.

services.title: Services
services.description: I offer specialized web development services tailored to meet your specific needs. Currently, I'm focused on e-commerce solutions and website development packages, with more services coming soon.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Development
ecommerce.description: Custom e-commerce solutions built with modern technologies like Next.js and PostgreSQL. Features include product management, shopping cart, order processing, and inventory management.

website.title: Website Development Package
website.description: Complete website development package including design, development, hosting, and domain registration. Perfect for small businesses and personal brands looking to establish an online presence.

frontend.title: Full Stack Development
frontend.description: Complete full stack development using React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and other modern technologies. From frontend UI to backend APIs and database management.

api.title: API Integration
api.description: Integration with third-party APIs and services to extend your website's functionality. Experience with RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and various service providers.

cta.title: Interested in working together?
cta.description: If you're interested in any of these services or have a custom project in mind, feel free to reach out. I'd be happy to discuss how I can help bring your vision to life.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision. Feel free to reach out using the form below or through my contact information.

form.name: Name

placeholders.message: Hi, I'm interested in developing an online store. Could you send pricing and estimated timelines?

footer.description: Full Stack Web Developer specializing in modern web technologies

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Web Developer with a passion for creating modern, responsive web applications. I specialize in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, and I'm always eager to learn new technologies.
about.paragraph2: When I'm not coding, I enjoy playing video games, watching movies, and spending time with my family. I'm also a big fan of retro computing and video game history, which inspired this portfolio's unique design.
